testcase.name: Successfully create an account with default balance
testcase.system-out: Given An account with CBU 123456789 and alias "hellow12"....................passed Then The account with CBU 123456789 should be have a balance of 0.0.........passed

testcase.name: Successfully create an account with an initial balance
testcase.system-out: Given An account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed Then The account with CBU 123456789 should be have a balance of 1000.0......passed

testcase.name: Cant create an account with a repeat CBU
testcase.system-out: Given An account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed When I try to create another account with the same CBU 123456789, diferent alias "goodevening15" and a balance of 1000.0.passed Then The operation should be denied due to repeat CBU.......................passed

testcase.name: Cant create an account with a repeat alias
testcase.system-out: Given An account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed When I try to create another account with the same alias "hellow12", diferent CBU 55555555 and a balance of 1000.0.passed Then The operation should be denied due to repeat alias.....................passed

testcase.name: Cant create an account without a branch
testcase.system-out: When I try to create an account without a branch............................passed Then The operation should be denied due to branch can not be null...........passed

testcase.name: Cant create an account without an owner
testcase.system-out: When I try to create an account without an owner............................passed Then The operation should be denied due to owner can not be null............passed

testcase.name: Successfully dates modification
testcase.system-out: Given An account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed When I change alias to "bye14"..............................................passed Then The alias account should be "bye14"....................................passed

testcase.name: Successfully remove account
testcase.system-out: Given An account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed When I remove the account with CBU 123456789................................passed Then The account with CBU 123456789 should be dont exist....................passed

testcase.name: I cant remove a inexistent account
testcase.system-out: Given An account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed When I try to remove inexistent account with CBU 111111.....................passed Then The operation should be denied due to inexistent account...............passed

testcase.name: Successfully create a branch
testcase.system-out: Given I create a branch with branchNumber: 120, name: "branch120", direction: "Street 16".passed Then The branchNumber should be 120, the name should be "branch120" and the direction should de "Street 16".passed

testcase.name: Cant create a branch with repeat branchNumber
testcase.system-out: Given I create a branch with branchNumber: 120, name: "branch120", direction: "Street 16".passed When I try to create another branch with branchNumber: 120, name: "branch222", direction: "Street 21".passed Then The operation should be denied due to repeat branchNumber..............passed

testcase.name: Successfully branch name modification
testcase.system-out: Given I create a branch with branchNumber: 120, name: "branch120", direction: "Street 16".passed When I modificate branch name to "branch2"..................................passed Then The branch name should be "branch2"....................................passed

testcase.name: Successfully branch direction modification
testcase.system-out: Given I create a branch with branchNumber: 120, name: "branch120", direction: "Street 16".passed When I modificate branch direction to "Street 21"...........................passed Then The branch direction should be "Street 21".............................passed

testcase.name: Successfully remove branch
testcase.system-out: Given I create a branch with branchNumber: 120, name: "branch120", direction: "Street 16".passed When I remove the branch with out accounts..................................passed Then The branch should be dont exist........................................passed

testcase.name: I cant remove a branch with accounts
testcase.system-out: Given I create a branch with branchNumber: 120, name: "branch120", direction: "Street 16".passed When I try to remove the branch with accounts...............................passed Then The operation should be denied due to this branch have accounts........passed

testcase.name: Successfully client direction modification
testcase.system-out: Given A client with DNI: 12345, name: "Math", surname: "Johnson", direction: "Street 14" and born date: 19900413.passed When I modificate direction to "Street 15"..................................passed Then The direction should be "Street 15"....................................passed

testcase.name: Successfully client name modification
testcase.system-out: Given A client with DNI: 12345, name: "Math", surname: "Johnson", direction: "Street 14" and born date: 19900413.passed When I modificate name to "Josh"............................................passed Then The name should be "Josh"..............................................passed

testcase.name: Successfully client surname modification
testcase.system-out: Given A client with DNI: 12345, name: "Math", surname: "Johnson", direction: "Street 14" and born date: 19900413.passed When I modificate surname to "Garcia".......................................passed Then The surname should be "Garcia".........................................passed

testcase.name: Successfully remove client
testcase.system-out: Given A client with DNI: 12345, name: "Math", surname: "Johnson", direction: "Street 14" and born date: 19900413.passed When I remove the client with DNI 12345.....................................passed Then The client with DNI 12345 should be dont exist.........................passed

testcase.name: I cant remove a inexistent client
testcase.system-out: Given A client with DNI: 12345, name: "Math", surname: "Johnson", direction: "Street 14" and born date: 19900413.passed When I try to remove inexistent client with DNI 99999.......................passed Then The operation should be denied due to inexistent client................passed

testcase.name: Successfully create a client
testcase.system-out: Given A client with DNI: 12345, name: "Math", surname: "Johnson", direction: "Street 14" and born date: 19900413.passed Then The client should be create with DNI: 12345, name: "Math", surname: "Johnson", direction: "Street 14" and born date: 19900413.passed

testcase.name: Cant create a client with repeat DNI
testcase.system-out: Given A client with DNI: 12345, name: "Math", surname: "Johnson", direction: "Street 14" and born date: 19900413.passed When I try to create another client with DNI 12345..........................passed Then The operation should be denied due to repeat DNI.......................passed

testcase.name: Successfully deposit money into an account
testcase.system-out: Given A new account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed When I deposit 200.0 into the account.......................................passed Then The account balance should be 1200.0...................................passed

testcase.name: Cannot deposit a negative amount
testcase.system-out: Given A new account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed When I try to deposit -100.0 into the account...............................passed Then The operation should be denied due to negative amount..................passed And The account balance should remain 1000.0................................passed

testcase.name: Cannot deposit into a not owner or co-owner account
testcase.system-out: Given A new account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed When I try to deposit 100.0 into no owner or co-owner account...............passed Then The operation should be denied due to not owner or co-owner account....passed

testcase.classname: Search where an account is located in a branch
testcase.name: Successfully find the branch with CBU
testcase.system-out: Given An account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" radicated on the branch with name branchNumber: 120, name: "branchTest" and direction: "Street 15".passed When I look for the account branch with CBU 123456789.......................passed Then I get the branchNumber: 120, name: "branchTest", direction: "Street 15".passed

testcase.classname: Search where an account is located in a branch
testcase.name: Successfully find the branch with alias
testcase.system-out: Given An account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" radicated on the branch with name branchNumber: 120, name: "branchTest" and direction: "Street 15".passed When I look for the account branch with alias "hellow12"....................passed Then I get the branchNumber: 120, name: "branchTest", direction: "Street 15".passed

testcase.classname: Search where an account is located in a branch
testcase.name: Cant find the branch for inexistent CBU
testcase.system-out: Given An account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" radicated on the branch with name branchNumber: 120, name: "branchTest" and direction: "Street 15".passed When I look for the account branch with CBU 19029393920.....................passed Then The operation should be denied due to inexistent CBU...................passed

testcase.classname: Search where an account is located in a branch
testcase.name: Cant find the branch for inexistent alias
testcase.system-out: Given An account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" radicated on the branch with name branchNumber: 120, name: "branchTest" and direction: "Street 15".passed When I look for the account branch with alias "dontExist199"................passed Then The operation should be denied due to inexistent aliass................passed

testcase.classname: Search if the cliente is married
testcase.name: Successfully found the client is married
testcase.system-out: Given A client with DNI: 12345, name: "Math", surname: "Johnson", direction: "Street 14" and born date: 19900413 and his wife who is client too with DNI: 56789, name: "Kamala", surname: "Harrison", direction: "Street 14" and born date: 19911013. They have marrige on 20241022.passed When I look for the fist account marriage...................................passed Then I get the wedding date 20241022........................................passed

testcase.name: Successfully transfer money
testcase.system-out: Given A client with an account with CBU 1234, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0 and a second client with an account CBU 5678, alias "bye14" and balance of 1000.0.passed When I transfer 200.0 to the alias "bye14"..................................passed Then The first account balance should be 800.0 and the second account balance should be 1200.0.passed

testcase.name: Cannot transfer a negative amount
testcase.system-out: Given A client with an account with CBU 1234, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0 and a second client with an account CBU 5678, alias "bye14" and balance of 1000.0.passed When I try to transfer -100.0 to the alias "bye14"..........................passed Then The operation should be denied due to negative amount..................passed And The first account balance should remain 1000.0 and the second account balance should remain 1000.0.passed

testcase.name: Cannot transfer more money than available balance
testcase.system-out: Given A client with an account with CBU 1234, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0 and a second client with an account CBU 5678, alias "bye14" and balance of 1000.0.passed When I try to transfer 1100.0 to the alias "bye14"..........................passed Then The operation should be denied due to insufficient founds..............passed And The first account balance should remain 1000.0 and the second account balance should remain 1000.0.passed

testcase.name: Cannot transfer to inexistent alias
testcase.system-out: Given A client with an account with CBU 1234, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0 and a second client with an account CBU 5678, alias "bye14" and balance of 1000.0.passed When I try to transfer 200.0 to the alias "fail15"..........................passed Then The operation should be denied due to inexistent alias.................passed And The account balance should remain 1000.0................................passed

testcase.name: Successfully transfer money with CBU
testcase.system-out: Given A client with an account with CBU 1234, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0 and a second client with an account CBU 5678, alias "bye14" and balance of 1000.0.passed When I transfer 200.0 to the CBU 5678.......................................passed Then The first account balance should be 800.0 and the second account balance should be 1200.0.passed

testcase.name: Cannot transfer a negative amount with CBU
testcase.system-out: Given A client with an account with CBU 1234, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0 and a second client with an account CBU 5678, alias "bye14" and balance of 1000.0.passed When I try to transfer -100.0 to the CBU 5678...............................passed Then The operation should be denied due to negative amount..................passed And The first account balance should remain 1000.0 and the second account balance should remain 1000.0.passed

testcase.name: Cannot transfer more money than available balance with CBU
testcase.system-out: Given A client with an account with CBU 1234, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0 and a second client with an account CBU 5678, alias "bye14" and balance of 1000.0.passed When I try to transfer 1100.0 to the CBU 5678...............................passed Then The operation should be denied due to insufficient founds..............passed And The first account balance should remain 1000.0 and the second account balance should remain 1000.0.passed

testcase.name: Cannot transfer to inexistent CBU
testcase.system-out: Given A client with an account with CBU 1234, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0 and a second client with an account CBU 5678, alias "bye14" and balance of 1000.0.passed When I try to transfer 200.0 to the CBU 9999................................passed Then The operation should be denied due to inexistent cbu...................passed And The first account balance should remain 1000.0 and the second account balance should remain 1000.0.passed

testcase.name: Successfully withdraw money when the balance is sufficient
testcase.system-out: Given A new account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed When I withdraw 300.0 from the account......................................passed Then The account balance should be 700.0....................................passed

testcase.name: Cannot withdraw more money than available balance
testcase.system-out: Given A new account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed When I try to withdraw 1100.0 from the account..............................passed Then The operation should be denied due to insufficient founds..............passed And The account balance should remain 1000.0................................passed

testcase.name: Cannot withdraw money to a not owner or co-owner account
testcase.system-out: Given A new account with CBU 123456789, alias "hellow12" and a balance of 1000.0.passed When I try to withdraw 100.0 from not owner or co-owner account.............passed Then The operation should be denied due to not owner or co-owner account....passed
